title: Cisco Momentum Design System – Webex's Framework
content: Momentum Design from Directories: Components: Cisco Momentum Design System is Webex's design framework, offering a shared design language and essential building blocks for all Webex products. Momentum includes wide library of color values, typography, sizing units, and spacing guidelines. Design System provides standardized documentation and empowers teams to create coherent digital and physical workplace experiences, facilitating effective connections among users. Accessibility Color System Component overview Icons Illustrations Layout Motion Tokens Typography Avatar Badges Checkbox Chip Dialog Divider List Progress bar Progress indicator Switch Tabs
